allow:
Bash(node -e "
const centerLat = 37.2990, centerLng = 126.9715
const stepM = 300, rows = 4, cols = 4
const latStep = stepM / 111000
const lngStep = stepM / \(111000 * Math.cos\(centerLat * Math.PI / 180\)\)

const points = []
for \(let r = 0; r < rows; r++\)
  for \(let c = 0; c < cols; c++\)
    points.push\({
      lat: +\(centerLat + \(r - \(rows-1\)/2\) * latStep\).toFixed\(5\),
      lng: +\(centerLng + \(c - \(cols-1\)/2\) * lngStep\).toFixed\(5\),
    }\)

console.log\('그리드 포인트:'\)
points.forEach\(\(p,i\) => console.log\(i, p.lat, p.lng\)\)
console.log\(\)
console.log\('lat 범위:', Math.min\(...points.map\(p=>p.lat\)\).toFixed\(5\), '~', Math.max\(...points.map\(p=>p.lat\)\).toFixed\(5\)\)
console.log\('lng 범위:', Math.min\(...points.map\(p=>p.lng\)\).toFixed\(5\), '~', Math.max\(...points.map\(p=>p.lng\)\).toFixed\(5\)\)
console.log\('검색반경 포함 lat:', \(Math.min\(...points.map\(p=>p.lat\)\) - 350/111000\).toFixed\(5\), '~', \(Math.max\(...points.map\(p=>p.lat\)\) + 350/111000\).toFixed\(5\)\)
")
